about.title: About the Instructor
about.subtitle: Learn the workflow behind real AI-built products
about.bio: Yousef teaches the practical system he uses to move from raw idea to deployed application: planning, UI direction, AI-assisted implementation, review, security, SEO, Docker, and production delivery.
about.credentials: AI workflow builder · Full-stack delivery · Production-focused training
about.philosophy: The course is built around one idea: AI becomes useful when the workflow is clear. Every lesson turns a messy step into a repeatable system you can use on your own projects.

faq.items.workflow.q: What exactly will I learn in this course?
faq.items.workflow.a: You'll learn a complete 7-phase workflow: planning with PRDs and specs, UI direction before code, Spec Kit implementation, AI code review and E2E tests, security and performance hardening, SEO and tracking, then Docker deployment with CI/CD.
faq.items.prerequisites.q: Do I need to be an expert to take this course?
faq.items.prerequisites.a: You do not need to be an AI expert, but this is not for someone who has never touched programming. It is best for non-technical founders with strong product focus, beginners with basics, and developers who want a repeatable workflow.
faq.items.guarantee.q: What if I don't like the course or it doesn't work for me?
faq.items.guarantee.a: If the course is not a fit, contact support within the first 7 days. The goal is for serious students to get real value, not to keep people in the wrong program.
faq.items.lifetime.q: Will I have lifetime access to the course?
faq.items.lifetime.a: Yes. Pay once and get lifetime access to all course materials, recordings, and any future updates at no additional cost.
